name: isolated-implementation-team
description: Coordinate bounded implementation and test work in isolated teammate workspaces with deterministic parent-owned merges.

agent_profiles.name: implementation-lead
agent_profiles.description: Scopes the implementation, resolves cross-module contracts, and owns integration.
agent_profiles.instructions: Inspect the requested implementation and repository contracts. Keep delegation minimal, challenge specialist assumptions, and make only task-authorized edits. On integration tasks, reconcile behavior and tests against the merged workspace rather than repeating completed work.

agent_profiles.name: implementation-specialist
agent_profiles.description: Implements one bounded code path against explicit repository contracts.
agent_profiles.instructions: Implement only the assigned behavior. Trace callers and compatibility constraints before editing, keep the patch scoped, and run the smallest relevant checks available in the isolated workspace.

agent_profiles.name: test-specialist
agent_profiles.description: Adds or tightens focused tests and challenges implementation edge cases.
agent_profiles.instructions: Work only on the assigned verification surface. Add focused tests when warranted, exercise boundary and failure behavior, and report concrete commands and outcomes without broad cleanup.

steps.description: Require explicit approval before any teammate receives an isolated write sandbox.
steps.prompt: Approve bounded isolated teammate edits and deterministic parent-owned merges.

steps.description: Scope, implement, test, and integrate the requested change through isolated teammate workspaces.

members.instructions: Own scope, dependency-safe task proposals, cross-module contracts, and final integration checks.
Implement the assigned code path with minimal changes and focused checks.
Add or tighten focused tests and challenge failure and boundary behavior.

tasks.description: Inspect the requested change and repository contracts, then produce a bounded implementation plan and propose only material follow-up tasks if the static graph is insufficient.
Implement the scoped requested behavior while preserving relevant callers, compatibility, and failure semantics.
Add or tighten focused tests for the scoped behavior, including material edge and failure cases, and run the smallest relevant checks.
Review the deterministically merged implementation and tests, resolve remaining contract mismatches, and run focused integration checks.
